zh.All Saints Church, Hanmanby, Yorkshire,: 英國越可爾希亞活哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Everard de Ros於大約1148年出生在英國越可爾爾姆斯利時，他的父親Robert de Ros26歲，母親Sybil de Valognes22歲。他於1169年與Roese de Trussebut在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1183年9月之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國越可爾希亞活哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

zh-hans.All Saints Church, Hanmanby, Yorkshire,: 英国越可爾希亞活哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Everard de Ros于大约1148年出生在英国越可爾爾姆斯利时，他的父亲Robert de Ros26岁，母亲Sybil de Valognes22岁。他于1169年与Roese de Trussebut在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1183年9月之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国越可爾希亞活哥吉拉 沙智 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ros
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Enrique, Luis, Jose, Alberto, Eduardo, Rafael, Elena, Fidel, Joaquin, Manuel, Pablo, Ramon.  Southeast Asian Leang, Phon, Lap, Phan, Pho, Saroeun, Sophal, Sophan, Sophea, Tha, Thang, Yen.
Catalan: nickname for someone with blond hair or a fair complexion, ultimately from Latin russus.

variants.name: Rus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Romanian Simion, Grigore, Doina, Dorel, Ilie, Liviu, Petru, Vasile.

Czech, Slovak, and Romanian (of Slavic origin): ethnic name for a Russian, ultimately derived from an Old Norse term meaning ‘oarsman, rower’ (from the root roths-), a reference to the fact that the Russian state was established by Scandinavians who rowed their ships up rivers inland from the Baltic sea. In some cases this may also be origin of the Slovenian and Croatian surname (see 3 below).
Czech: descriptive nickname from the adjective rusý ‘blond’.

variants.name: Ross
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from one or other of a number of Scottish and English places called Ross or Roos(e), especially Roose (Lancashire) and Roos (East Yorkshire). The placenames derive from a British ancestor of Welsh rhos ‘moor, heath, plain’, which is the sense of the cognate Gaelic word ros. The Scottish surname has at least three origins. First, the Anglo-Norman family from Roos (East Yorkshire) was introduced to Scotland when Robert of Roos, lord of Wark Castle (Northumberland), married Isabella, an illegitimate daughter of King William the Lion. Second, various families took the name from the province of Ross in northern Scotland and other places of that name. Third, there were Norman families in Scotland by the 13th century who probably derived their name from Rots in Normandy (see 2 below). The descendants of Godfrey de Ros, tenant of the de Morville lords of Cunninghame, were major landholders in Ayrshire, and almost certainly took their name from Rots. The Rose family of Kilravock (Nairnshire) may take their name from either of these three (see Rose ). The lairds of Balnagown adopted the surname Ross after the earldom of Ross (to which they considered themselves rightful heirs) had passed into other hands through the female line.

English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Rots in Calvados (France), probably named with the ancient Germanic element rod ‘clearing’ (compare Rhodes ). This was the original home of a family de Ros, who were established in Kent in 1130 and had major estates in Kent until well into the 13th century.

English: habitational name from Wrose, in Shipley, near Bradford (Yorkshire), with re-spelling of Wr- as R- due to the loss of /w/ before /r/ in early modern English pronunciation. The spelling Wrose is no longer current. The placename derives from Old English wrāse ‘knot, something twisted’, referring to the steep-sided hill on which the settlement stands, with the sense ‘broken or twisting hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from eofor ‘boar’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was reinforced at the time of the Norman Conquest by a Continental Germanic form introduced to Britain by the Normans. The modern given name may be a transferred use of the surname, but it was in regular use in the Digby family of Rutland from the 15th to the 17th centuries, probably as a survival of the Norman name. It alternated in this family with Kenelm .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Everard de Ros was born about 1148, in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert de Ros, was 26 and his mother, Sybil de Valognes, was 22. He married Roese de Trussebut in 1169, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died before September 1183, in his hometown, and was buried in All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

fr.All Saints Church, Hanmanby, Yorkshire,: All Saints Church, Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Everard de Ros est né environ 1148, à Helmsley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ros, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sybil de Valognes, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Roese de Trussebut en 1169, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant septembre 1183, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à All Saints Church, Harewood, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.All Saints Church, Hanmanby, Yorkshire,: All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Everard de Ros um 1148 in Helmsley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ros 26 und seine Mutter Sybil de Valognes 22. Er hat 1169 in Yorkshire, England Roese de Trussebut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor September 1183 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Everard de Ros è nato il circa 1148 nel Helmsley, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Ros, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Sybil de Valognes, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Roese de Trussebut nel 1169, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì prima del settembre 1183, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, England.

ja.All Saints Church, Hanmanby, Yorkshire,: イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドアル サインツ チャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Everard de Rosが約1148年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヘルムスリーで生まれた時，父Robert de Rosは26歳，母Sybil de Valognesは22歳であった。1169年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでRoese de Trussebutと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1183年9月以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアハーエウッドアル サインツ チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Church, Hanmanby, Yorkshire,: 영국 요르크실르 하레우드 앨 세인츠 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Everard de Ros(이)가 대략 1148년 영국 요르크실르 헬슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ros(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil de Valognes(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1169년 영국 요르크실르에서 Roese de Trussebut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1183년 9월 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 하레우드 앨 세인츠 처르치에 묻혔다.

pt.All Saints Church, Hanmanby, Yorkshire,: All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Everard de Ros nasceu aproximadamente 1148, em Helmsley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ros, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sybil de Valognes, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Roese de Trussebut em 1169, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes setembro de 1183, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.All Saints Church, Hanmanby, Yorkshire,: алл сеинц чурч, харюуд, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Everard de Ros родился около 1148 г. в местности хелмсли, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Ros было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Valognes, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Roese de Trussebut в 1169 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер перед сентябрь 1183 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц чурч, харюуд, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Roese de Trussebut en 1169, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió antes de septiembre de 1183, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en All Saints Church, Harewood, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
